members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

referencedTypes.name: Component
referencedTypes.description:
A type used in public APIs where a component type is expected.
The constructor type is an artificial type returned by defineComponent().

members.name: forceMount
members.description:
Used to force mounting when more control is needed.

Useful when controlling animation with Vue animation libraries.

props.name: CheckboxRootProps
props.resolvedType: { id?: string; modelValue?: CheckedState | null; defaultValue?: CheckedState; value?: DefinedValue; disabled?: boolean; name?: string; required?: boolean }

members.name: id
members.description: Id.

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The controlled value of the checkbox. Can be bound with v-model.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description: The value of the checkbox when it is initially rendered. Use when you do not need to control its value.

members.name: value
members.description: The value given as data when submitted with a `name`.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with the checkbox

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the field. Submitted with its owning form as part of a name/value pair.

members.name: required
members.description: When `true`, indicates that the user must set the value before the owning form can be submitted.

callables.name: update:modelValue
callables.description: Event handler called when the value of the checkbox changes.
